name: Crispy Fried Oatmeal Slices
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the oats into briskly boiling salted water.
- Cook for 1 minute if using quick oats, stirring occasionally.
- Cook for 5 minutes or longer if using old-fashioned oats.
2. Cover the pan and remove from heat. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the ham or bacon.
4. Pour the mixture into an ungreased loaf pan measuring 8-1/2 inches x 4-1/2 inches x 2-1/2 inches.
5. Cool slightly, then cover and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
6. Cut into 16 slices.
7. Pan-fry in a small amount of butter until golden brown, about 10 minutes per side.
8. Serve hot with butter and syrup.
